title: galactia glabella
intro: Galactia glabella, also known as the cluster-leaf milkpea or cluster-leaf milkpea, is a perennial vine native to North America, belonging to the Fabaceae family of legume plants. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Galactia glabella include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing irritated throats and lungs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to harness its therapeutic potential and provide relief from respiratory ailments.
